title: The North-western Provinces and Oudh Act, 1890
full_text: The North-western Provinces and Oudh Act, 1890 पश्‍चिमोत्तर प्रान्‍त और अवध अधिनियम, 1890 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189020 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1890-10-16 Act Year: 1890 Short Title: The North-western Provinces and Oudh Act, 1890 Hindi Title: पश्‍चिमोत्तर प्रान्‍त और अवध अधिनियम, 1890 Long Title: An Act to provide for the better administration of the North-Western Provinces and Oudh and to amend certain enactments in force in those Provinces and in Oudh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 16-10-1890 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The North-western Provinces and Oudh Act, 1890 PART I THE NORTH-WESTERN PROVINCES PART II OUDH PART III THE NORTH-WESTERN PROVINCES AND OUDH Section 1. Title. Section 2. Commencement of Part I. Section 3. 3 and 4 Repealed. Section 5. Laws in force in certain districts of the Allahabad Division to apply to Jhansi. Section 6. [Repealed.]. Section 7. Discharge of functions assigned to Deputy Commissioner and Commissioner by Act 17 of 1866. Section 8. Jhansi Division to cease to be a Scheduled District. Section 9. Application of Act 12 of 1887 to Jhansi, and disposal of pending cases. Section 10. Commencement of Part II. Section 11. Board of Revenue of the North-Western Provinces to be the Board of Revenue of, and Chief Revenue-authority in, Oudh. Section 12. [Repealed.]. Section 13. [Repealed.]. Section 14. [Repealed.].
